topics.name: 100–200 Level: Engineering Drawing, Mechanics, and Materials
topics.description: ENG 101 Engineering Drawing, MEE 211 Engineering Mechanics, MEE 221 Strength of Materials.

subtopics.name: MEE 211: Applied Mechanics — Statics and Dynamics (UNN)
objectives: Analyse 2D and 3D force systems using equilibrium equations and free body diagrams
Solve dynamics problems using Newton's laws, work-energy, and impulse-momentum theorems

subtopics.name: MEE 221: Strength of Materials and Mechanical Behaviour
objectives: Calculate stress, strain, and deflection in beams, shafts, and pressure vessels
Determine factor of safety under tensile, compressive, torsional, and combined loading

topics.name: 300 Level: Thermodynamics, Fluid Mechanics, Machine Design
topics.description: MEE 301 Thermodynamics, MEE 311 Fluid Mechanics, MEE 321 Machine Design.

subtopics.name: MEE 301 & MEE 311: Applied Thermodynamics and Fluid Mechanics at UNN
objectives: Analyse gas power cycles (Otto, Diesel, Brayton) and vapour power cycles (Rankine) for Nigerian power plants
Apply Bernoulli, continuity, and momentum equations to pipe flow, pumps, and turbine problems

subtopics.name: MEE 321: Machine Design — Fasteners, Gears, and Bearings
objectives: Design mechanical joints, gears, belt drives, and chain drives under given load conditions
Select rolling element bearings based on load rating and L10 life calculations

topics.name: 400–500 Level: Manufacturing, Heat Transfer, Vibrations & Final Project (UNN)
topics.description: MEE 401 Manufacturing Technology, MEE 411 Heat Transfer, MEE 421 Vibrations, MEE 499 Project.

subtopics.name: MEE 401 & MEE 411: Manufacturing Processes and Heat Transfer
objectives: Describe and compare CNC machining, welding, casting, and additive manufacturing in Nigerian industrial context
Solve heat transfer problems using conduction, convection, and radiation in heat exchanger design

subtopics.name: MEE 499: UNN Final Year Engineering Design Project
objectives: Design, fabricate, test, and document a complete mechanical system addressing a real engineering need
Defend project before UNN Faculty of Engineering and Physical Sciences board
